role_balance.description: Score based on role distribution in the comp

map_fit.description: Agents match the map via good_maps OR S/A meta tier

synergy.description: Complementary combos (entry+flash, smokes+entry, recon+entry, anchor+flank, post-plant+zone) plus shared-tag cohesion

meta_alignment.description: Bonus for agents with S/A/B meta tier on the selected map (from VCT data)

warnings.no_controller: No Controller selected — your team lacks smokes for site executes.
warnings.no_initiator: No Initiator selected — your team lacks opening utility and information.
warnings.no_sentinel: No Sentinel selected — your team has no site anchor or flank coverage.
warnings.too_many_duelists: Too many Duelists (3+) — your team lacks utility and support.
warnings.no_entry_duelist: No entry-focused Duelist — who is opening site?
warnings.no_smokes: No Controller smokes in your comp — you cannot safely execute sites.
warnings.no_recon: No recon utility — your team is playing blind.
warnings.no_post_plant: No post-plant utility — you may struggle to secure rounds.
warnings.no_flank_control: No flank control — your team is vulnerable to rotations.
warnings.low_map_fit: Several agents are not ideal for this map.
